name: Center
description: Flexbox helper that centers its children on both axes.

api.name: Center
api.description: Flexbox helper that centers its children on both axes.

examples.title: With Fixed Height
examples.code:
<Center Height="200px">
    <Stack Align="center" Gap="2">
        <DynamicIcon Name="Image" Class="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground" />
        <Text Color="muted" Size="sm">No image selected</Text>
    </Stack>
</Center>

examples.title: Inline Center
examples.code:
<Text>
    Click the
    <Center Inline="true" Class="h-6 w-6 rounded bg-primary/20 mx-1">
        <DynamicIcon Name="Plus" Class="h-3 w-3 text-primary" />
    </Center>
    icon to add an item.
</Text>

mdSummary:
# Center

Flexbox helper that centers its children on both axes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/center

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Center | Height | `string?` | `` |  |
| Center | Inline | `bool` | `` |  |
| Center | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Center | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Center | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Center) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Center />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Center/Center.razor`
